title: tengine.checkpoint.restored v1
description: Snapshot blob pre-seeded into GPU pool buffers before frame work, emitted by the C courier (ext_checkpoint_cache.c, bead lkxk4). Part of the warmup-snapshot-cache surface (epic 9neza, kudbl). Producer: registry handle CHECKPOINT_RESTORED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is the chain name (e.g. 'svdag').

chain.description: Warmup chain name this snapshot belongs to (e.g. 'svdag').

key_spirv.description: Cache key component derived from the SPIR-V shader hash in effect at restore time.

key_seed.description: Cache key component derived from the world-generation seed in effect at restore time.

payload_bytes.description: Size of the restored snapshot blob, in bytes.

restored_frame.description: GPU frame index at which the snapshot was seeded into GPU pool buffers.

wt.description: Work-type id the snapshot was restored for (e.g. 645 for svdag_noise_direct).
